creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fixed the missing file issue by adding MANCOMPRESSED=yes to the Makefile.
I can submit a new patch if you like. Man page formatting issue seems to
be problem upstream.

Steve

> The following reply was made to PR ports/169203; it has been noted by
> GNATS.
>
> From: Rouslan Iskhakov <rouslan@rshell.net>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: ports/169203: [PATCH] sysutils/facter: update to 1.6.10
> Date: Mon, 2 Jul 2012 00:28:56 +0200 (CEST)
>
>  Hi,
>
>  I've got when ran "make install":
>
>  =3D=3D=3D>   Compressing manual pages for facter-1.6.10
>  gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man8/facter.8: No such file or directory
>  =3D=3D=3D>   Registering installation for facter-1.6.10
>
>  pkg_add is working properly...
>
>  and the man page is not properly formatted
>
>
>  ()
>  =
>   ()
>
>
>
>  NAME
>          -
>
>  SYNOPSIS
>         Collect and display facts about the system.
>
>  USAGE
>         facter    [-d|--debug]    [-h|--help]    [-p|--puppet]
> [-v|--versi=
>  on]
>         [-y|--yaml] [fact] [fact] [...]
>
>
>  ----- Original Message -----
>  From: "Edwin Groothuis" <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
>  To: rouslan@rshell.net
>  Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
>  Sent: =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=BA,
> 1=
>  8 =D0=98=D1=8E=D0=BD=D1=8C 2012 =D0=B3 18:20:29
>  Subject: Re: ports/169203: [PATCH] sysutils/facter: update to 1.6.10
>
>  Maintainer of sysutils/facter,
>
>  Please note that PR ports/169203 has just been submitted.
>
>  If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  and a committer will take care of it.
>
>  The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/169203
